data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of deterministic waitlist ordering per batch.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Deterministic waitlist ordering per batch', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the ordering of the waitlist or how it is determined. The existing evidence focuses on bookings and waitlist management but does not address the core requirement of deterministic ordering, indicating a gap in the validation process. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the deterministic ordering of the waitlist per batch.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the waitlist ordering requirement.
